title: "En Güçlü Kadın" (Turkey's Most Powerful Woman) Leaders (2018–2025 Trends)
author: Saka, Tugce Nuray
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Overview.  This dataset aggregates publicly available prize‑winner lists from two Turkish business magazines between 2018 and 2025: Fortune Turkey (“50 Most Powerful Businesswomen”) and Ekonomist (“50 En Güçlü Kadın CEO”). The file provides facts only (names, ranks, titles, companies, years, list titles, and source URLs); no copyrighted text or personal contact information is included.  Files.   dataset_harmonized_v3.xlsx  (main)  Columns.  Keys for longitudinal matching ( name_canonical ), readable labels ( name_std ), original/translated titles ( title_original ,  title_en ), year‑specific and standardized organizations/titles ( company ,  company_equalized ,  title_equalized ), plus provenance ( magazine ,  list_name ,  source_url ).  Provenance & Cleaning.  Rows compiled from public announcements; URLs are included per year. Cleaning steps: whitespace/placeholder removal, note‑line removal, type coercion for year/rank, country uppercasing, honorific extraction, canonical name creation, optional equalization of title/company by most frequent variant, and English translation of titles when needed.  Intended use.  Tracking multi‑year appearances, analyzing rank dynamics, job mobility, and organizational representation in Turkish business media lists.

keywords: repetition of leadership awards granted to women
